text: Most sales reps today use AI that's stuck in a chat box.
Nox AI Assistant is the first that actually does work for you.
ChatGBT, Claude, Gemini, they're brilliant generalists,
but they don't know your accounts, your prospects,
or what's actually building pipeline and closing deals.
They give you answers, you still end up copy-pasting
into another system to actually do the work.
Nox AI Assistant is different.
It sits on top of all of it, routing every task
to the best model for the job
and plugs into everything that runs your go-to-market system.
Handed a territory and it builds a strategy,
finds the right people and writes every sequence.
Let it run overnight and your whole team wakes up
to prioritize accounts with custom branded outreach
ready to send.
Ask it what's working and it turns the answer
into plays that the entire order can run at scale.
This isn't a better chat bot.
This is what being on the frontier of AI looks like
for go-to-market teams.
Doing things that nobody thought was possible a year ago
and shipping something new every week.
Nox AI, stop chatting, start selling.
That's intelligent app out.
